CREATE TABLE test_numbers (id INT, value DOUBLE);
INSERT INTO test_numbers VALUES (1, 2.0), (2, 3.0), (3, 2.0), (4, NULL), (5, 3.0);
SELECT prod(distinct value) FROM test_numbers;
CREATE TABLE test_multi (group_id INT, value FLOAT);
INSERT INTO test_multi VALUES (1, 1.5), (1, 2.5), (2, 1.5), (2, NULL), (3, 3.5);
SELECT prod(distinct value) FROM test_multi WHERE group_id = 1;
SELECT prod(distinct value) FROM test_multi WHERE group_id IN (1, 2);
CREATE TABLE more_numbers (val DOUBLE);
INSERT INTO more_numbers VALUES (NULL), (5.0), (5.0), (6.0), (7.0);
SELECT prod(distinct val) FROM more_numbers;
CREATE TABLE nested_test (id INT, val DOUBLE);
INSERT INTO nested_test VALUES (1, 1.0), (2, 2.0), (3, 3.0), (4, 1.0);
SELECT (SELECT prod(distinct val) FROM nested_test) + 5 AS total_product;
SELECT prod(distinct val) FROM (SELECT val FROM nested_test WHERE id > 1) AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE join_test1 (group_id INT, val FLOAT);
CREATE TABLE join_test2 (group_id INT, val FLOAT);
INSERT INTO join_test1 VALUES (1, 2.0), (1, 3.0), (2, 5.0);
INSERT INTO join_test2 VALUES (1, 2.0), (2, NULL);
SELECT prod(distinct t1.val) FROM join_test1 t1 JOIN join_test2 t2 ON t1.group_id = t2.group_id WHERE t1.val IS NOT NULL;
SELECT prod(distinct value + 1) FROM test_numbers;
SELECT prod(distinct 10 + i % 3) FROM (SELECT generate_series(1, 10) AS i) AS gs;
